basics.name: Dor Tzabari
basics.label: Co-Founder & GTM Operator — Building AI Products
basics.summary: GTM operator who builds from scratch. Over 8+ years taking products from early traction to enterprise adoption: qualified pipeline, paid POCs, and long-term commercial partnerships across the US, EMEA, and APAC. Co-founded a smart-city startup (sole-source vendor to Tel Aviv Municipality). Works at the intersection of innovation, strategy, and execution — building the relationships and systems that accelerate product-market fit.

work.name: Smart-City Startup
work.summary: Co-founded a smart-city startup that became the sole-source vendor to Tel Aviv Municipality.
